title: oxalis monophylla var. rotundifolia
intro: Oxalis monophylla var. rotundifolia, also known as the Round-leaved Wood-sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oxalis monophylla var. rotundifolia include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
